title: Add search command
description:
Add CLI command to set or clear search query.

Commands:
  kbs console search <query>  - Set search query
  kbs console search --clear  - Clear search

Behavior:
- Updates searchQuery state in frontend
- Applies same filtering logic as SearchInput component
- Searches across: title, description, id, labels
- Case-insensitive matching
- Works in combination with viewMode and focus filters

Implementation:
- Add SearchQueryChanged UIControl event
- Frontend handler updates searchQuery via setSearchQuery
- Should match existing SearchInput behavior
creator: ryan.porter
